title: Latest open artifacts (#21): Open model bonanza! Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1 & others. On CAISI's V4 assessment.
reason: Multiple new open models with weights released, offering immediate utility for builders.
post_text: Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1 weights released. Builders can now benchmark these new open models to find immediate performance or cost improvements for their AI applications.
source_angle: Tracking new open model releases and their implications for builders.

title: Recent Developments in LLM Architectures: KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention
reason: New open-weight LLMs implement architectural changes for concrete cost reduction in long contexts. Ships today.
post_text: Gemma 4 and DeepSeek V4 integrate KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention to cut long-context costs. Evaluate these open-weight models for cheaper long-context inference, or apply these architectural insights.
source_angle: Open-weight LLMs reduce long-context inference costs via new architectures.
